programme.title: Married At First Sight Uk
programme.desc: (M) It's Experts Week and Charlene's intimacy workshop spices things up for some of the new couples. One bride's patience wears thin with her new groom.

programme.title: Married At First Sight Uk
programme.desc: Strangers are matched by experts and marry upon first meeting, embarking on a high-stakes social experiment. Couples navigate relationships, intimacy, and conflict while living together and attending commitment ceremonies. Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.

programme.title: Married At First Sight: Episode
programme.desc: Strangers are matched by experts and marry upon first meeting, embarking on a high-stakes social experiment. Couples navigate relationships, intimacy, and conflict while living together and attending commitment ceremonies. Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.

programme.title: Married At First Sight Uk
programme.desc: (M) One couple continue to clash ahead of a tense and highly emotional Commitment Ceremony. There's a 'do-I-stay?' dilemma while other relationships blossom like wedding day bouquets.

programme.title: Married At First Sight Uk
programme.desc: Strangers are matched by experts and marry upon first meeting, embarking on a high-stakes social experiment. Couples navigate relationships, intimacy, and conflict while living together and attending commitment ceremonies. Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.

Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.
